reason: This task PRD — 2 W2-2b-specific ADRs (Q1 stages / Q2 WorkflowRunType) + 4 inherited from W2-2a (Q0/Q3/Q4/Q5), R1-R28 requirements, AC-1~AC-23, 2 PR breakdown, R-Risk-1~5
executeScan / executePlan are new inner functions sharing RunCtx with existing executeXxx — single-point dispatchStep router invariant must hold (W2-1 PR3 / W2-2a PR1 pattern)

WorkflowStage += scan/plan in shared; WorkflowRunType += refactor in shared with 3 mirror sites in apps (runner/api-client, web/main); KNOWN_FLOW_IDS dual list — alignment across shared/runner/api/web is critical

Canonical FLOW_REGISTRY contracts — § 5.5 'Adding a new flow' recipe is the literal checklist; W2-2a PR3 already extended this doc with issue.standard, W2-2b appends refactor.standard following the same pattern

W2-2a PRD — W2-2b inherits Q0 (split) / Q3 (acceptance gate stage-history-aware) / Q4 (placeholder SkillSpec) / Q5 (no knowledge promotion) verbatim; only Q1 (stages) and Q2 (WorkflowRunType) are W2-2b-specific
W2-1 R1-R3 compatibility (V1/feature.standard zero-regression); ADR Q1=α (kind/skillId placeholder no-consumption — W2-2b must not activate)
W2-3 thin extension pattern reference (~3 PR / 1 week cadence); W2-2b is even smaller (~2 PR) since gate-engine work was done in W2-2a
Wave 2 roadmap — Q4 naming convention (FlowId / StageStep / WorkflowRunType); W2-2b is the second half of the W2-2 split
V2 design source — § 1.3 V1 process rigidity / § 2.1 philosophy 1 work-type polymorphism / § 4.2 phase 1 three workflows (refactor is the third) — refactor.standard completes the V2 § 4.2 trio
WorkflowStage / FlowId / WorkflowRunType / WorkflowRun.flowId in packages/shared/src/types/workflow.ts; AgentTaskKind in packages/shared/src/types/agent.ts
TS quality bar — FlowId / WorkflowRunType must be string-literal union (not free string); new enum values need JSDoc; FLOW_REGISTRY's Readonly<Record> guards exhaustiveness

runner backend spec index — orchestrator main + dispatchStep + executeXxx inner-function style; SkillSpec/findSkillForStage in apps/runner/src/skills/index.ts; KNOWN_FLOW_IDS validation in apps/runner/src/index.ts; CLI usage string
runner quality bar — _exhaustive: never guards dispatchStep switch; RunCtx not exported; SkillSpec instructions are contract layer; api-client type literal mirror keeps in sync
executeScan / executePlan failure paths flow through cmdOrchestrate top-level catch; c.ok.value = false rather than swallowing throw is the contract locked by W2-1 PR3
api backend spec index — gate-engine in apps/api/src/gate-engine.ts (already stage-history-aware after W2-2a PR2); routes/workflow-runs.ts holds second KNOWN_FLOW_IDS list
api quality bar — gate-engine single responsibility maintained; refactor flow auto-adapts via existing stage-history-aware logic (no new gate engine work in W2-2b)
web/main.ts WorkflowRunType literal mirror + typeSelect option list need 'refactor' added; web frontend conventions
